title: Bridge Essay: Applying the Neurodynamics of Emotional Circular Causalities in Psychosocial and

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Form/Meditation** (Phase 7) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Form/Meditation to mechanistic neuroscience through Applying, the, Neurodynamics, of, Emotional.

**Applying the Neurodynamics of Emotional Circular Causalities in Psychosocial and Cognitive Therapy using Multi-Sensory Environments: An ORBDE Case Study Analysis.** — Nonlinear Dynamics Psychol Life Sci. PMID: 28923160. DOI:. This exploratory, evidence-based practice research study focuses on presenting aplausible mesoscopic brain dynamics hypothesis for the benefits of treating clients with psychosocial and cognitive challenges using amindful therapeutic approach and multi-sensory environments.
